ab: Batu, minpungul caak madas i ispapatas, maqtu asu pasimul zakun?
ch: W:Batu，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: ,kacaw I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka’ inak amin, icia ca dii ki Kaut.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Kaut’s.

ab: Maqtu naupa mukhivang pasimul zakun, namahiav caak macauqais suan.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Uu, siza’i
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Miqumicang, kadangazing amin miqumicang i Kaut.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: Ma’az ca na’asaun su’u?
en: May I help you?

ab: Macauqais azak i dusa’ tu paitasan dii.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Uu, ma’azing ca asaun su’u duma?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: mauqnang caak simul i taau tu paitasan.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Uu na, aka’a tu minpungul macauqais ca taaukinqanin.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ni’ang asu macauqais zakun isqaqaisqais naak.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: cauqaisunin zaku tu takna qa.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Makua cuna munghav ca isqaqaisqais naak.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Niitu ispasimul suu it Batu?
en: Did you lend it to kacaw?

ab: Nii caak maqanciap, tanamun zaku macingav a cia ti.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Tangusunang zaku asu pasimul i isqaqaisqais naak.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Kaut, icia Batu sinpasimul i suu ca paknata’un i?
en: panay, did kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: Nii, sinbaliv i tina naak ca kini.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Maszang icia kit Batu ca paknata’un suu.
en: kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Niitu mazang ca patas naak, madaqdung ca icia.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Kaut, misimul asu haan Batu ki cui?
en: panay, did you borrow money from kacaw?

ab: Uu, ala cauqaisun zaku haip haan cian a, minpungul caak madas i cui.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Nalakua asu macauqais?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Nacauqaisun zaku ca laqbing.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Uu, nakadangdazan zaku asu taqu kit Batu.
en: Okay, I will tell kacaw for you.
